rows.description: Soluta Varia
rows.notes: Consensus from gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear header text.

rows.description: Acc: Diner
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's row type and lack of amount, as 'Acc: Diner' clearly functions as a header for a braced group with sub-items and an aggregate amount on subsequent lines. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this with sub-items and an amount.

rows.description: Wine 1.2
rows.notes: From gemini-flash. This is a distinct sub-item line within the 'Acc: Diner' braced group, with no individual amount. gpt-5-mini combined this into a single row description.

rows.description: Wood 3.3
rows.notes: From gemini-flash. Distinct sub-item line within 'Acc: Diner' group. gpt-5-mini combined it.

rows.description: Cogno 2.2
rows.notes: From gemini-flash. Distinct sub-item line within 'Acc: Diner' group. Visual verification confirms 'Cogno 2.2' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Coppe 2s 8d'.

rows.description: Coffe 0.3
rows.notes: From gemini-flash. Distinct sub-item line within 'Acc: Diner' group. Visual verification confirms 'Coffe 0.3' is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Coffee 0:8'.

From gemini-flash. This is the clear aggregate amount (3.0.6) for the 'Acc: Diner' braced group. Description is blank on the ledger. gpt-5-mini incorrectly included this amount with the header description.

rows.description: To Dr. Pr: Tho: Carows Tax
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which more accurately reflects 'To Dr. Pr: Tho: Carows Tax' visually compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Pd. Tho. pr. The Cardw: Tax'.

rows.description: To Mr Gagnièr
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which includes the accent on 'Gagnièr' visible in the image.

rows.description: For a Bible for ye Chappol
rows.notes: Consensus from gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for both description and amount.

rows.description: To Mr. Payn ye Brasier for plates, Buttery &c.
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which more accurately reflects 'Payn' and 'Brasier' visually compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Payne' and 'Brazier'.

rows.description: For Xmas newyears day, & twelfth day
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's amount of 0.10.0. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read this as 10.3.6.

rows.description: For Mr. Ellis for makinge 13 napkins for ye Fellows Table
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amount 0.3.6 from gemini-flash. Description combines 'Ellis' from gemini-flash and 'Fellows Table' from gpt-5-mini, which is more accurate visually. The spelling of 'Follows' vs 'Fellows' presented minor ambiguity.

rows.description: For Mador of ye Antiq. & Hist of Excheq~
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amount 1.0.0 and description from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the amount as 0.1.0 and had 'Hypt' instead of 'Hist'.

rows.description: For Clements for Building ye Book
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amount 0.2.10 and description from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the pence as 6 and 'Binding' instead of 'Building'.

rows.description: For a Buttry Xmas 1711
rows.notes: From gemini-flash. This is a distinct header line for a braced group. gpt-5-mini combined this with sub-items and an amount.

From gemini-flash. This is a distinct sub-item line within the 'For a Buttry Xmas 1711' braced group, with no individual amount. gpt-5-mini combined it into one row with an inaccurate sub-description.

From gemini-flash. This is the clear aggregate amount (2.1.0) for the 'For a Buttry Xmas 1711' braced group. Description is blank on the ledger. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this amount with the header description.

rows.description: For a Dinner in ye Hall for Mr Coghill
rows.notes: From gemini-flash. This is a distinct header line for a braced group. The amount is on the following blank line. gpt-5-mini incorrectly attached the amount to this line.

From gemini-flash. This is the clear aggregate amount (0.7.8) for the 'For a Dinner in ye Hall' braced group. Description is blank on the ledger. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this amount with the header description.

rows.description: For Wine att ye Same Time
rows.notes: From gemini-flash. This is a distinct header line for a braced group. The amount is on the following blank line. gpt-5-mini incorrectly attached the amount to this line.

From gemini-flash. This is the clear aggregate amount (0.10.0) for the 'For Wine att ye Same Time' braced group. Description is blank on the ledger. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this amount with the header description.

rows.description: Cons: Annu: 9.3.0 Mich 6.18.0
rows.notes: From gemini-flash. This is a distinct entry line with embedded amounts but no amount in the final columns. Visual verification confirms its presence. gpt-5-mini entirely missed this row.

rows.description: Cands: Broadwater 11.19.0
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amount 27.19.0 and description from gemini-flash. The pence digit is a clear '0', not '6' as read by gpt-5-mini, despite gpt-5-mini's high confidence for its amount.

rows.description: To Mr. Clacson for a Pulpit cloth & Cussion
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which more accurately reflects 'Clacson' and 'Cussion' visually compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Cleackson' and 'Cushion'.

rows.description: To Mr. Fran: Bugge By Consent
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amount 1.1.0 and description from gemini-flash. The pence digit is a clear '0', not '6' as read by gpt-5-mini.

rows.description: To Simon Studd gardener work in ye Back yard
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which more accurately reflects 'Studd' and 'gardener' visually compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Stubbs' and 'Gardiner'.

rows.description: To Cogny for fowel
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amount 40.0.0 and description from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini had a significantly different and inaccurate reading of both description ('To Requisition for fuel') and amount (48.0.0).

rows.description: For Reparion of ye Library & Boriainds Building in Part
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amount 120.1.0 and description from gemini-flash, including the interlineated 'Building'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the pence as 9 and had different description details ('Drawings' instead of 'Boriainds').

rows.description: To Mr. Horno for ye Tax 1711
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amount 5.12.0 and description from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read pounds as 6 and 'Honour' instead of 'Horno'.

rows.description: To Mr. Faber for ye Founders Picture
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amount 0.2.0 from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the pence as 8.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Faber for the Founders' picture (artwork for the college).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Faber for the Founders' picture, amounting to £0 2s 0d.

rows.description: Wages for Reparations of Serdany Buildg
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which more accurately reflects 'Wages for Reparations of Serdany Buildg' compared to gpt-5-mini's significantly different reading ('For Repairs of Paviers & Building(s)').
rows.english_description: Wages paid for repairs to the Serdany building.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Wages for repairs to the Serdany building, amounting to £32 15s 0d.

rows.description: Jenty tax 15.8. Blay 15.8
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which more accurately reflects 'Jenty tax 15.8. Blay 15.8' compared to gpt-5-mini's slightly different and less precise 'Jenerly tax 1s & Blay 1s 8d'.
rows.english_description: Payment of the Jenty tax and the Blay tax.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the Jenty tax and the Blay tax, amounting to £1 13s 4d.

rows.description: To Mr. Sherwin for Bring Joly med. Rent
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms amount 0.2.0 and description from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the pence as 8 and had different description details ('Jerry and Rent' instead of 'Joly med. Rent').
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Sherwin relating to July rent (rent payment).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Sherwin relating to July rent, amounting to £0 2s 0d.

rows.description: For wine on ye 5th of octo
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which more accurately reflects 'For wine on ye 5th of octo'. gpt-5-mini had a significantly different and inaccurate reading of the description ('For window in ye sth of ...').
rows.english_description: Purchase of wine for use on the 5th of October.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of wine for the 5th of October, amounting to £1 0s 0d.

rows.description: For Cleansing ye follor To ye Butter
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which more accurately reflects 'Cleansing ye follor To ye Butter' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Cleaning of ye Stalles By Butler'.
rows.english_description: Cleaning of the buttery floor (buttery cleansing).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Cleaning of the buttery floor, amounting to £0 3s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Clarke for Peny Ink, & paper, &c.
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which more accurately reflects 'Peny Ink' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Ovens, Ink'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Clarke for pen, ink, paper and other stationery supplies.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Clarke for pen, ink, paper, and sundries, amounting to £0 14s 1d.

rows.description: Summa
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description 'Summa' taken from gemini-flash, which is visually more accurate than 'Suma'.
